locations.name: St Pauls Cathedral, London
locations.semantic_criteria: A massive domed cathedral surrounded by dense central London architecture.

locations.name: Eiffel Tower, Paris
locations.semantic_criteria: A highly intricate wrought-iron lattice tower standing tall over a flat Parisian park.

locations.name: Statue of Liberty, New York
locations.semantic_criteria: A colossal neoclassical copper statue situated on an island surrounded by water.

locations.name: Christ The Redeemer, Rio
locations.semantic_criteria: An Art Deco statue of Jesus Christ situated on the peak of the Corcovado mountain.
